author: Pixar YouTube
text:
Toy Story 5 | Taylor Swift Featurette | Now Playing Only In Theaters
"It means so much to me to be a part of this film."

Taylor Swift reflects on the inspiration behind her #1 original song “I Knew It, I Knew You,” from the #1 movie in the world, Toy Story 5! Experience it in theaters now.
